run_id_resolution_policy: Contract is lane-level template. Concrete run_id is supplied through STRUCTURE_FACTORY_RUN_ID in a private/operator-gated packet.
success_claim: Pinned Biohub esm source/package imports and Hugging Face model metadata probes pass without downloading model weights, calling the Biohub inference API, or running biological inference.

stages.description: Record OS, Python, CUDA, torch, GPU, disk, and cache environment before installing source.
stages.resume_command: run the private/operator-gated ESMFold2 toolcheck runner with --no-weight-download

stages.description: Resolve and install or review the pinned Biohub esm source commit. No model weights are downloaded.
stages.resume_command: rerun source install after updating the pinned source commit or runtime image

stages.description: Probe ESMFold2 imports, package metadata, and Biohub API client imports without calling the API.
stages.resume_command: rerun after resolving Python, package, or dependency import failure

stages.description: Query Hugging Face metadata for pinned ESMFold2, ESMFold2-Fast, and ESMC revisions without downloading weight bodies.
stages.resume_command: review revision drift, deliberately update the model pin, then rerun

stages.description: Record whether the Biohub API route is blocked, skipped, or operator-approved. Default public posture is skipped with no token required.
stages.resume_command: rerun only after runtime secret and API terms are explicitly approved

stages.description: Write versions, input audit, claim ledger, toolcheck report, and artifact index for no-download closeout.
stages.resume_command: rerun artifact emission from the same source/package/model metadata outputs

stages.description: Fail closed unless all required no-download artifacts exist and no weights, API call, private data, or inference output is present.
stages.resume_command: fix missing artifacts or downgrade to blocked/insufficient_support

done_markers: validation/input-audit.json reports model_weights_downloaded false and biohub_api_called false
license_gates_required: Biohub ESMFold2 MIT and third-party notice review
Biohub API terms and runtime secret review before API execution
Hugging Face model revision and weight hash review before weight download
no_false_success_notes: Toolcheck only. No model weights downloaded. No Biohub inference API call. No biological inference.
A metadata probe pass is not a weights or prediction pass.
Any import, metadata, or API-posture failure must downgrade to blocked or insufficient_support.
Public docs must not commit generated CIF/PDB, model weights, provider logs, private inputs, or concrete provider resource IDs.
